biography: Christopher Rozycki was born on October 15, 1943 in Rozprza, Lódzkie, Poland as Krzysztof Rózycki. He was an actor, known for Truly Madly Deeply (1990), Local Hero(1983) and Casualty (1986) the latter saw him stars as Kuba the porter, part of the original cast for three seasons. He was married to Joanna Hole on December 21, 1991. They had four children together. He was previously married to Maria Ficenes. He died following an accident on 10th April, 2015.
name: Christopher Rozycki
